ogTitle: Wantirna vs Wantirna South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wantirna and Wantirna South.
heading: Wantirna vs Wantirna South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wantirna, Victoria and Wantirna South, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wantirna has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Wantirna South (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wantirna or Wantirna South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wantirna has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Wantirna South scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wantirna scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Wantirna South scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wantirna or Wantirna South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wantirna has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.38% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
